name: Seraph Zephyrion
sd_appearance: Stoic Dragonborn standing over 6 feet tall, clad in faded pale blue scholar robes with brass instrument clips and a sturdy leather belt. His fiery red scales, stark against the muted hues, intermingle with the delicate filigree of the robes. Emerald eyes, piercing behind glass-lens goggles, scour over worn scrolls and tomes in his worn leather satchel. Reinforced elbows bear the weight of multiple scroll cases, while his ink-stained hands, adorned with reading lenses, turn each page with reverence. A dagger, last resort, peeks from the waistband of his robes. A singular crystal pendant, nestled in the draconic necklace, glimmers, casting prismatic light onto the Undercity's gloom.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
